name: Java
description: Object-oriented software development, concurrency, multithreading, and enterprise backend solutions.

name: Spring Boot
description: Designing RESTful and gRPC microservices, config servers, gateway routing, and dependency injections.

name: Spring Security
description: Configuring JWT authentications, filters, CORS filters, and role-based access controls (RBAC).

name: Hibernate
description: Object-Relational Mapping (ORM) setup, database migrations, mapping entities, and query optimizations.

name: Python
description: Writing performant asynchronous APIs, scripting data loaders, and model integration.

name: FastAPI
description: Building high-performance asynchronous API endpoints using Pydantic validation and dependency injection.

name: Django
description: Developing robust monolithic and split-backend services using Django ORM, authentication, and admin layers.

name: JavaScript
description: Developing client-side interactive UI logic, handling DOM manipulations, and API calls.

name: React.js
description: Building responsive UI single page applications using state hooks, context, and components.

name: Tailwind CSS
description: Styling layouts using clean responsive utility classes and modern layout tokens.

name: Leaflet
description: Rendering geo-spatial coordinate points, building pollution grids, and adding interactive maps.

name: Kafka
description: Configuring distributed event streams, managing topic partitions, and consumer group offsets.

name: gRPC
description: Defining Proto files, compiling client-server code stubs, and accelerating service-to-service transfers.

name: Docker

name: Redis

name: WebSockets
description: Enabling full-duplex bi-directional communications for live chat rooms and system state alerts.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Relational schemas indexing, query writing, and transaction properties optimizations.

name: MySQL
description: Setting up schemas, connecting server drivers, and running standard data queries.

name: TimescaleDB

name: Pinecone
description: Indexing embedding vectors, tuning cosine similarity metrics, and querying database collections.

name: Spring AI
